version_nodes.reason: v4.0 closeout schema remains descriptive evidence for v4.1 readiness.
Phase 1 refresh manifest schema is visible and deterministic.
Phase 2 dependency graph schema is visible and deterministic.
Phase 3 lineage certification schema is visible and deterministic.
Future schema provider is unsupported and remains fail-visible.
Schema migration execution provider is prohibited and remains visible.

version_transitions.reason: Manifest schema extends v4.0 readiness evidence without migration.
Dependency graph schema references manifest evidence descriptively.
Lineage certification schema references dependency governance evidence descriptively.
Schema governance adds compatibility visibility without migration capability.
Future schema provider cannot be governed silently.
Stale manifest schema version is visible and not corrected.
Unapproved schema version jump is visible and not migrated.
Schema lineage continuity gap is visible and not repaired.
Schema provenance continuity gap is visible and not inferred.
Schema replay continuity gap is visible and not executed.
Schema rollback continuity gap is visible and not recovered.
Circular schema ancestry is visible and not traversed.
Migration execution path is prohibited and remains visible.
Unknown compatibility is blocked and not corrected.
